functions.name: qoqo_for_braket.post_processing._post_process_circuit_result
documentation:
Post processes the result returned from an AWSQuantumTask.

Handles translation of samples of all qubits (the default)
into qoqo registers.

Args:
    results: results to be processed
    metadata: associated metadata of the job
    input_bit_circuit: the circuit containing InputBit operations

Returns:
    Tuple[Dict[str, List[List[bool]]],
          Dict[str, List[List[float]]],
          Dict[str, List[List[complex]]]: processed results

functions.name: qoqo_for_braket.interface.ionq_verbatim_interface.call_circuit
documentation:
Convert a qoqo Circuit to a Braket Circuit with verbatim instructions for IonQ.

Moving the RotateZ operations past the GPi, GPi2 and MS gates respects the following:
* RotateZ(theta) GPi(phi) = GPi(phi + theta) RotateZ(theta)
* RotateZ(theta) GPi2(phi) = GPi2(phi + theta) RotateZ(theta)
* RotateZ(0, theta_0) RotateZ(1, theta_1) MS(0, 1, phi_0, phi_1)
    = MS(0, 1, phi_0 + theta_0, phi_1 + theta_1) RotateZ(0, theta_0) RotateZ(1, theta_1)

Args:
    circuit: the qoqo Circuit to be translated

Returns:
    Circuit: the converted circuit in Braket form

Raises:
    RuntimeError: Unsupported operation for IonQ verbatim interface.

classes.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.__init__
documentation:
Initialise the BraketBackend class.

Args:
    device: Optional ARN of the Braket device to use. If none is provided, the                     default LocalSimulator will be used.
    aws_session: Optional AwsSession to use. If none is provided, a new one will be created
    verbatim_mode: Whether to use verbatim boxes to avoid recompilation
    batch_mode: Run circuits in batch mode when running measurements.                     Does not work when circuits define different numbers of shots.
    use_hybrid_jobs: Uses hybrid jobs to run measurements and register measurements.

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.allow_use_actual_hardware
documentation: Allow the use of actual hardware - will cost money.

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.disallow_use_actual_hardware
documentation: Disallow the use of actual hardware.

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.force_rigetti_verbatim
documentation: Force the use of rigetti verbatim. Mostly used for testing purposes.

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.force_ionq_verbatim
documentation: Force the use of ionq verbatim. Mostly used for testing purposes.

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.force_iqm_verbatim
documentation: Force the use of iqm verbatim. Mostly used for testing purposes.

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.force_oqc_verbatim

documentation:
Change the maximum number of shots allowed.

Args:

documentation:
Change the maximum circuit length allowed.

Args:

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.__create_device
documentation:
Creates the device and returns it.

Returns:
    The instanciated device (either an AwsDevice or a LocalSimulator)

Raises:
    ValueError: Device specified isn't allowed. You can allow it by calling the
                `allow_use_actual_hardware` function, but please be aware that
                this may incur significant monetary charges.

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend._run_circuit
documentation:
Simulate a Circuit on a AWS backend.

The default number of shots for the simulation is 100.
Any kind of Measurement instruction only works as intended if
it is the last instruction in the Circuit.
Currently only one simulation is performed, meaning different measurements on different
registers are not supported.

Args:
    circuit (Circuit): the Circuit to simulate.

Returns:
    (AwsQuantumTask, {readout, output_registers, output_lengths}, input_bit_circuit)

Raises:
    ValueError: Circuit contains multiple ways to set the number of measurements
runs a circuit internally and can be used to produce sync and async results

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend._run_circuits_batch
documentation:
Run a list of Circuits on a AWS backend in batch mode.

The default number of shots for the simulation is 100.
Any kind of Measurement instruction only works as intended if
it is the last instruction in the Circuit.
Currently only one simulation is performed, meaning different measurements on different
registers are not supported.

Args:
    circuits (List[Circuit]): the Circuits to simulate.

Returns:
    (AwsQuantumTaskBatch, {readout, output_registers}, input_bit_circuit)

Raises:
    ValueError: Circuit contains multiple ways to set the number of measurements
runs a circuit internally and can be used to produce sync and async results

Prepares a braket circuit for running on braket.

Args:

Returns:

    the readout and the InputBit circuit.

Returns:

Run all circuits of a measurement with the AWS Braket backend using hybrid jobs.

Using hybrid jobs allows us to naturally group the circuits from a measurement.

Returns:

            Dict[str, List[List[bool]]],
            Dict[str, List[List[float]]],
            Dict[str, List[List[complex]]],
        ],
        Dict[str, float],
    ]

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.run_measurement_registers_hybrid_queued
documentation:
Run all circuits of a measurement with the AWS Braket backend using hybrid jobs.

Using hybrid jobs allows us to naturally group the circuits from a measurement.

Args:
    measurement: The measurement that is run.

Returns:
    QueuedHybridRun

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend._run_measurement_registers_hybrid
documentation:
Run all circuits of a measurement with the AWS Braket backend using hybrid jobs.

Using hybrid jobs allows us to naturally group the circuits from a measurement.

Args:
    measurement: The measurement that is run.
    wait_until_complete: Whether to wait for the job to complete.                Should be False when using queued runs.

Returns:
    AwsQuantumJob

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.run_measurement
documentation:
Run a circuit with the AWS Braket backend.

Args:
    measurement: The measurement that is run.

Returns:
    Optional[Dict[str, float]]

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.run_program
documentation:
Run a qoqo quantum program on a AWS backend multiple times.

It can handle QuantumProgram instances containing any kind of measurement. The list of
lists of parameters will be used to call `program.run(self, params)` or
`program.run_registers(self, params)` as many times as the number of sublists.
The return type will change accordingly.

If no parameters values are provided, a normal call `program.run(self, [])` call
will be executed.

Args:
    program (QuantumProgram): the qoqo quantum program to run.
    params_values (Union[List[float], List[List[float]]]): the parameters values to pass
    to the quantum program.

Returns:
    Optional[
        List[
            Union[
                Tuple[
                    Dict[str, List[List[bool]]],
                    Dict[str, List[List[float]]],
                    Dict[str, List[List[complex]]],
                ],
                Dict[str, float],
            ]
        ]
    ]: list of dictionaries (or tuples of dictionaries) containing the
        run results.

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.run_circuit_queued
documentation:
Run a Circuit on a AWS backend and return a queued Job Result.

The default number of shots for the simulation is 100.
Any kind of Measurement instruction only works as intended if
it are the last instructions in the Circuit.
Currently only one simulation is performed, meaning different measurements on different
registers are not supported.

Args:
    circuit (Circuit): the Circuit to simulate.

Returns:
    QueuedCircuitRun

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.run_measurement_queued
documentation:
Run a qoqo measurement on a AWS backend and return a queued Job Result.

The default number of shots for the simulation is 100.
Any kind of Measurement instruction only works as intended if
it are the last instructions in the Circuit.
Currently only one simulation is performed, meaning different measurements on different
registers are not supported.

Args:
    measurement (qoqo.measurement): the measurement to simulate.

Returns:
    QueuedProgramRun

methods.name: qoqo_for_braket.backend.BraketBackend.run_program_queued
documentation:
Run a qoqo quantum program on a AWS backend multiple times return a list of queued Jobs.

This effectively performs the same operations as `run_program` but returns
queued results.

The hybrid parameter can specify whether to run the program in hybrid mode or not.

Args:
    program (QuantumProgram): the qoqo quantum program to run.
    params_values (List[List[float]]): the parameters values to pass to the quantum
        program.
    hybrid (bool): whether to run the program in hybrid mode.

Raises:
    ValueError: incorrect length of params_values compared to program's input
        parameter names.

Returns:
    List[Union[QueuedProgramRun, QueuedHybridRun]]

Qoqo backend execution qoqo objects on AWS braket.

Args:
    device: The AWS device the circuit should run on.
            provided as aws arn or for local devices
            starting with "local:" as for the braket QuantumJob
    aws_session: An optional braket AwsSession. If set to None
                 AwsSession will be created automatically.
    verbatim_mode: Only use native gates for real devices and block
                   recompilation by devices
    batch_mode: Run circuits in batch mode when running measurements.
                Does not work when circuits define different numbers of shots.
